name: Deviled Eggs a La Jadi
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Canned tuna - drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the eggs in half, lengthwise.
2. Remove the hardened yolks into a mixing bowl.
3. Add scallions, tuna, mustard, soy sauce, oil, lemon juice, salt and pepper to taste.
4. Mix well.
5. Fill the egg white halves with the tuna/egg yolk mixture.
6. Sprinkle tops with paprika.
Note: Crab meat or abalone may be substituted for the tuna.
